ticketId.description: Stable id (e.g. issue number + slug or UUID).

source.description: Issue URL, email ref, or intake channel.

summary.description: One-line technical summary for Orchestrator / Implementation agents.

impact.description: User-facing or operational impact (severity, blast radius).

steps.description: Ordered steps; minimal, deterministic where possible.

environment.description: Runtime and git pin; extend with env flags as needed.

orchestratorHints.description: Free-text hints, e.g. RLS, payroll kernel, ML governance.

conditionalSkills.description: Skill identifiers to attach on delegated Tasks (e.g. hr-backend-compliance).

failureSummaryBlock.description: FAILURE_SUMMARY envelope if CI or QA produced one.

requiresPoCheckpoint.description: True if fix/new work needs Feature brief or spike ADR per orchestrator step 1.

advocateNotes.description: Internal triage notes (repro result, cannot-repro hypothesis).
